为什么 和 Project Assistant 有关系？
因为我刚才找到并能直接修改的“状态栏宿主代码”，不是 OpenAI 官方 Codex 扩展本体，而是你本机装的这个扩展： - `~/.codex/skills/project-assistant/integrations/vscode-host/extension.js`
单独做，不要碰assitant 要有边界；

decision.archive_summary: Active topic remains the independent VS Code context-size display feature. Preserve user requirements that the context size be directly visible from the status-bar flow, update automatically without manual refresh, and be implemented with clear boundaries separate from Project Assistant. Earlier testing chatter and superseded implementation/status details can leave the next-turn raw prompt.
decision.reasoning_summary: This is still the same task family, so relation=continue. The newest user intent depends on the independence/boundary constraint plus the earlier product requirements for always-visible, auto-updating context display. Those requirement turns should survive semantically as pins. Raw status/progress turns about prior commands, panel hookup, and the temporary Project Assistant coupling are good eviction candidates because they are either solved, superseded, or explanatory rather than needed evidence for the next turn.

applied.archiveSummary: Active topic remains the independent VS Code context-size display feature.
